story.title: Basic Form
story.label: form basic contact message
story.summary: Standard contact form with text, email, select, textarea, consent, and submit controls.

story.title: Validation States
story.label: form validation states feedback
story.summary: Bootstrap valid and invalid states with feedback messages wired to each control.

story.title: Floating Labels
story.label: form floating labels
story.summary: Compact fields using Bootstrap floating labels for text, email, select, and textarea controls.

story.title: Sign-Up
story.label: form sign-up account registration
story.summary: Account creation form with identity fields, password requirements, plan choice, and terms consent.

story.title: Login Form
story.label: form login authentication remember
story.summary: Focused authentication form with email, password, remember-me, recovery link, and alternate action.

story.title: User Profile
story.label: form user profile account details
story.summary: Profile editor with personal details, job information, avatar upload, and biography fields.

story.title: Application Settings
story.label: form application settings preferences
story.summary: Application preferences form with locale, timezone, notifications, privacy, and API key controls.

story.title: Survey Form
story.label: form survey feedback rating
story.summary: Feedback survey with rating radios, multi-select interests, satisfaction level, and comments.
